summary: Comprehensive testing of CrewZ e-commerce website after dark-to-light theme redesign. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). All 14 frontend pages load correctly with new Mailchimp-inspired light theme. Full shopping flow (add to cart -> checkout -> order tracking) works end-to-end. Theme change successfully applied with warm cream #FFFDF7 backgrounds, white cards, dark navy text, and dark navy footer.
critical_code_review_comments: SMTP email is built but not configured (logs warning instead of sending) - expected per requirements
Product images use placeholder stock photos - noted in UI with disclaimer text
Testimonials are placeholder - noted in UI with disclaimer text
test_credentials: No credentials needed for guest checkout. Admin uses Emergent Google OAuth.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme change from dark to light successfully verified. All core functionality tested and working. Backend APIs unchanged and all pass. Frontend pages all render correctly with new light theme: Homepage (hero with dark overlay, product cards, differentiators, email capture), 3 product pages (/products/speed, /cox, /coach), Shop page with currency selector, Cart page with quantity controls, Checkout page with form validation, Order tracking with status timeline, Support page with FAQ accordion, Technology page, Compare page with feature table, Founders page, App page with download buttons, Admin page with Google OAuth login, Returns policy, Privacy policy. Mobile menu works correctly. Footer has all 8 navigation links.

backend_apis.GET /api/products: PASS - Returns 3 products with correct pricing ($200 Speed, $250 Cox, $300 Coach)
backend_apis.POST /api/newsletter: PASS - Subscribes email, handles duplicates gracefully
backend_apis.POST /api/contact: PASS - Submits contact message, validates required fields
backend_apis.POST /api/orders: PASS - Creates order, calculates totals, handles currency conversion
backend_apis.GET /api/orders/track/{order_number}: PASS - Returns order details with status timeline
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/*: PASS - All admin endpoints return 401 when unauthenticated

frontend_pages.Homepage: PASS - Hero with dark overlay, product cards (white), differentiators, comparison, email capture
frontend_pages.Product Pages (/products/speed, /cox, /c: PASS - Product data, features, specs, PRE-ORDER button
frontend_pages.Shop Page: PASS - All 3 products, currency selector (USD/GBP/AUD), add to cart buttons
frontend_pages.Cart Page: PASS - Items display, quantity controls, currency selector, PROCEED TO CHECKOUT button
frontend_pages.Checkout Page: PASS - Form validation, order summary, PLACE PRE-ORDER submission
frontend_pages.Order Tracking Page: PASS - Search form, order status timeline (Received->Confirmed->Production->Shipped->Delivered)
frontend_pages.Compare Page: PASS - Product comparison table (Speed vs Cox vs Coach)
frontend_pages.Founders Page: PASS - Built by a rower content with Olympic image
frontend_pages.App Page: PASS - Features, App Store/Google Play download buttons
frontend_pages.Admin Page: PASS - Shows Google OAuth login button when unauthenticated
frontend_pages.Returns Policy: PASS - 30-day return policy, refunds, warranty content
frontend_pages.Privacy Policy: PASS - Information collection, GDPR rights, cookies content

navigation.Header: PASS - Light glass header with logo, products dropdown, all nav links, SHOP button, cart icon
navigation.Mobile Menu: PASS - Opens/closes correctly, shows all navigation links
navigation.Footer: PASS - Dark navy footer with 8 links (Technology, Compare, Founders, App, Support, Shop, Returns, Privacy)

e2e_flows.Shopping Flow: PASS - Add to cart -> Cart -> Checkout -> Order confirmation (CZ-260421-95388F) -> Track order
e2e_flows.Newsletter Subscription: PASS - Email submission shows checkmark success indicator

theme_verification.Cards: PASS - White cards with gray borders
theme_verification.Text: PASS - Dark navy #1A1A2E text with good contrast
